name: Google Gemini
description: Google's flagship AI platform. Gemini 3.1 Pro doubled reasoning capability at the same price point, capturing 18% of global AI traffic in a single week.

name: OpenAI ChatGPT
description: The AI chatbot that started the revolution. Now running GPT-5.x with code generation, image creation, and newly launched advertising. Locked in a fierce rivalry with Claude and Gemini.

name: Anthropic Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant known for careful reasoning and long-context processing. Claude Opus 4.6 competes directly with GPT-5. Recently launched app integrations including Slack.

name: Runway
description: Pioneer in AI video generation. Gen-4.5 claimed the #1 spot before Kling 3.0 overtook it. Added native audio tools for complete video production workflows.

name: Kling AI
description: Chinese AI video generator that overtook Runway and Sora to become the highest-rated option. Kling 3.0 solved audio synchronization — a major breakthrough for AI video.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Leading AI voice platform. V3 released the most expressive voice model yet. Attracted investment from Matthew McConaughey. Powers voice cloning, text-to-speech, and dubbing.

name: Google Veo
description: Google's AI video generation model. Veo 3.1 introduced native 9:16 vertical video for YouTube Shorts — a first for AI video generators.

name: Canva AI
description: Design platform with deep AI integration. Now embedded inside both Claude and ChatGPT, making professional design accessible directly within AI chat interfaces.

name: Reddit Ads
description: Reddit's Max Campaigns introduced transparent AI-powered ad automation delivering 17% lower CPA than traditional platforms. A compelling alternative to Google and Meta.

name: DeepSeek
description: Chinese AI lab delivering frontier-level intelligence at 90% less cost than Western competitors. V3 disrupted market pricing assumptions and proved open-source can compete.

name: Synthesia
description: AI video platform specializing in avatar-based presentations and training content. Generates professional talking-head videos from text scripts.

name: Seedance
description: Emerging AI video generator positioning as the 'DeepSeek of video' — high quality at dramatically lower cost. Version 2.0 could disrupt the Runway/Kling duopoly.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered answer engine that coordinates 19 frontier models simultaneously — Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini, GPT, Grok, Veo, and more. Perplexity Computer completes entire marketing projects end-to-end from a single prompt.

name: Descript
description: AI-powered video and audio editor with Underlord assistant running on Claude Opus 4.6. Improved B-roll placement to 92% accuracy and filler word removal by 43%. Integrates Kling AI v3 and Sora 2 directly in the editing timeline.

name: Pictory
description: Pictory 2.0 repositioned from a text-to-video tool to a fully integrated AI video platform — avatars, generative video, interactive hosting, brand kits, Chrome extension, and PowerPoint plugin.

name: Higgsfield
description: AI actor casting system that solves character consistency across video scenes — the hardest unsolved problem in AI video. Soul Cast uses parametric design to maintain character identity without talent sourcing.

name: CapCut
description: ByteDance's video editor rebuilt its AI Video Maker with free storyboard-to-video production. Drops AI video production time to 15 minutes with no cost for basic use.

name: Gamma
description: Presentation and document platform that launched Gamma Imagine — an AI image generation tool challenging Canva and Adobe. Generates on-brand visuals directly inside the content creation workflow.

name: NVIDIA NemoClaw
description: NVIDIA's agentic AI platform for marketing workflows. Could reshape how small marketing teams operate by late 2026. Combines autonomous agent capabilities with enterprise-grade safety via OpenShell.
